name: aidlc-construction
description: AIDLC Phase 2 Construction extensions for agentic systems — opt-in component design, code generation with human-gated review, and TDD-for-agentic test strategy. Composes with awslabs/aidlc-workflows core-workflow and depends on Phase 1 (aidlc-inception) artifacts (requirements.md, user-stories.md, workflow-plan.md).
